item.title: iamgio /quarkdown
item.description: 🪐 Markdown with superpowers: from ideas to papers, presentations, websites, books, and knowledge bases.

item.title: donnemartin /system-design-primer
item.description: Learn how to design large-scale systems. Prep for the system design interview. Includes Anki flashcards.

item.title: Alishahryar1 /free-claude-code
item.description: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or discord like openclaw

item.title: CJackHwang /ds2api
item.description: Deepseek to API: A lightweight, high-performance full-stack middleware converting client protocols to universal APIs. Supports multi-account rotation, compiled binaries, Vercel Serverless, and Docker. Compatible with Google, Claude, and OpenAI API formats.

item.title: public-apis /public-apis
item.description: A collective list of free APIs

item.title: fspecii /ace-step-ui
item.description: 🎵 The Ultimate Open Source Suno Alternative - Professional UI for ACE-Step 1.5 AI Music Generation. Free, local, unlimited. Stop paying for Suno!

item.title: HunxByts /GhostTrack
item.description: Useful tool to track location or mobile number

item.title: davila7 /claude-code-templates
item.description: CLI tool for configuring and monitoring Claude Code

item.title: ComposioHQ /awesome-codex-skills
item.description: A curated list of practical Codex skills for automating workflows across the Codex CLI and API.

item.title: abhigyanpatwari /GitNexus
item.description: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

item.title: mattpocock /skills
item.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
